deterministic_issues.text: Non-nominative 'українською' (instrumental, VESUM: noun:inanim:f:v_oru) in M16. Only nominative case allowed before M25.
deterministic_issues.fix: Replace 'українською' (instrumental) with its nominative form or use English equivalent.

deterministic_issues.text: Accusative 'природу' (VESUM: noun:inanim:f:v_zna) in M16. Accusative not taught until M25.
deterministic_issues.fix: Replace 'природу' (accusative) with nominative form or use English equivalent.

deterministic_issues.text: Accusative 'каву' (VESUM: noun:inanim:f:v_zna) in M16. Accusative not taught until M25.
deterministic_issues.fix: Replace 'каву' (accusative) with nominative form or use English equivalent.
